blocks.text: Arsenal lead by five — title race resumes tonight at Amex and Etihad
Liverpool's stoppage-time implosion at Wolves hands Arsenal and City a clear run. Five points the gap — both in action tonight, both needing three points.
⚽ Wed 21:00 — El Derbi Vasco: Athletic Club must overturn 1-0 Copa del Rey deficit vs Sociedad
⛳ Thu 06:00 — Arnold Palmer Invitational: Hovland opens at Bay Hill
